# CWE-178 positive: inconsistent case handling for resource lookup
lang: go
file: CWE-178-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var allowedBuckets = map[string]bool{
	"reports": true,
	"public":  true,
}

// CWE-178 Improper Handling of Case Sensitivity
// Vulnerable line: compares lowered input against mixed-case map keys.
func OpenBucket(c *gin.Context) {
	bucket := strings.ToLower(c.Param("bucket"))
	if !allowedBuckets[bucket] {
		c.JSON(http.StatusForbidden, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"bucket": bucket})
}
